title: Prior Authorization Automation - AI-Based Decision Support
problem: Prior authorization requires clinical review that is manual, inconsistent, and delays care. Payers and providers need AI to accelerate decisions.
solution: AI-powered prior authorization automation. Clinical decision support for authorization requests. Automated determination based on clinical guidelines and medical necessity criteria.
technology: ML, clinical guidelines integration, automated decision support
traction_signals: Growing interest in AI for prior auth
varden_fit: CRITICAL — AI-based prior auth automation is the future. European payers need this desperately.
notes: CONTRARIAN: Prior auth is universally hated. AI automation is the only scalable solution. Zero European players.
